name: two-pass reconciler routes a refinement classification to update the matched existing rule rather than create a new one
command: printf '{"pattern_id":"p2","matched_rule_id":"r-existing","classification":"refinement"}\n' > decision.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/apply-classification.sh" --decision decision.json --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'action=update-existing' out.txt && grep -q 'rule_id=r-existing' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
